goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve 'north indian' food and should be in the 'moderate' price range.
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves 'modern european' food.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for '7 people' at '18:15' on 'thursday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the 'same price range as the restaurant' and should be in the 'centre'.
The hotel should be in the type of 'guesthouse' and 'doesn't need to have free parking'.
If there is no such hotel, how about one that is in 'the type of hotel'.
Make sure you get 'star of the hotel', 'address', and 'whether they have internet'.
You also want to book a 'taxi' to commute between the two places.
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant 'by the booked time'.
Make sure you get 'contact number' and 'car type'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve north indian food and should be in the moderate price range
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves modern european food
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 7 people at 18:15 on thursday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the same price range as the restaurant and should be in the centre
The hotel should be in the type of guesthouse and doesn't need to have free parking
If there is no such hotel, how about one that is in the type of hotel
Make sure you get star of the hotel, address, and whether they have internet
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time
Make sure you get contact number and car type
